revision.text:
'''己卯'''（つちのとう、きぼう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて16番目で、前は[[戊寅]]、次は[[庚辰]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は土、[[十二支]]の五行は木で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==己卯の年==
==己卯の日== ===[[選日]]=== 己卯の日は[[犯土|小土]]の3日目である。

'''己卯'''（つちのとう、きぼう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて16番目で、前は[[戊寅]]、次は[[庚辰]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は土、[[十二支]]の五行は木で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==己卯の年==
==己卯の日== ===[[選日]]=== 己卯の日は[[犯土|小土]]の2日目である。

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''己卯'''（つちのとう、きどのうさぎ、きどのう、きぼう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの16番目で、前は[[戊寅]]、次は[[庚辰]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[己]]は陰の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[卯]]は陰の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==己卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って19が余る年が己卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[19年]] *[[79年]] *[[139年]] *[[199年]] *[[259年]] *[[319年]] *[[379年]] *[[439年]] *[[499年]] *[[559年]] *[[619年]] *[[679年]] *[[739年]] *[[799年]] *[[859年]] *[[919年]] *[[979年]] | *[[1039年]] *[[1099年]] *[[1159年]] *[[1219年]] *[[1279年]] *[[1339年]] *[[1399年]] *[[1459年]] *[[1519年]] *[[1579年]] *[[1639年]] *[[1699年]] *[[1759年]] *[[1819年]] *[[1879年]] *[[1939年]] *[[1999年]] | *[[2059年]] *[[2119年]] *[[2179年]] *[[2239年]] *[[2299年]] *[[2359年]] *[[2419年]] *[[2479年]] *[[2539年]] *[[2599年]] *[[2659年]] *[[2719年]] *[[2779年]] *[[2839年]] *[[2899年]] *[[2959年]] |}
==己卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[2月]]が己卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==己卯の日== 己卯の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 己卯の日は[[犯土|小土]]の2日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:己卯]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:己卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:己卯]]

==己卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って19が余る年が己卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[19年]] *[[79年]] *[[139年]] *[[199年]] *[[259年]] *[[319年]] *[[379年]] *[[439年]] *[[499年]] *[[559年]] *[[619年]] *[[679年]] *[[739年]] *[[799年]] *[[859年]] *[[919年]] *[[979年]] | *[[1039年]] *[[1099年]] *[[1159年]] *[[1219年]] *[[1279年]] *[[1339年]] *[[1399年]] *[[1459年]] *[[1519年]] *[[1579年]] *[[1639年]] *[[1699年]] *[[1759年]] *[[1819年]] *[[1879年]] *[[1939年]] *[[1999年]] | *[[2059年]] *[[2119年]] *[[2179年]] *[[2239年]] *[[2299年]] *[[2359年]] *[[2419年]] *[[2479年]] *[[2539年]] *[[2599年]] *[[2659年]] *[[2719年]] *[[2779年]] *[[2839年]] *[[2899年]] *[[2959年]] |}
==己卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[2月]]が己卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==己卯の日== 己卯の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 己卯の日は[[犯土|小土]]の2日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Yin Earth Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:己卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:己卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Yin Earth Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:己卯]]

{{干支}} '''己卯'''（つちのとう、きどのうさぎ、きどのう、きぼう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの16番目で、前は[[戊寅]]、次は[[庚辰]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[己]]は陰の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[卯]]は陰の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==己卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って19が余る年が己卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[19年]] *[[79年]] *[[139年]] *[[199年]] *[[259年]] *[[319年]] *[[379年]] *[[439年]] *[[499年]] *[[559年]] *[[619年]] *[[679年]] *[[739年]] *[[799年]] *[[859年]] *[[919年]] *[[979年]] | *[[1039年]] *[[1099年]] *[[1159年]] *[[1219年]] *[[1279年]] *[[1339年]] *[[1399年]] *[[1459年]] *[[1519年]] *[[1579年]] *[[1639年]] *[[1699年]] *[[1759年]] *[[1819年]] *[[1879年]] *[[1939年]] *[[1999年]] | *[[2059年]] *[[2119年]] *[[2179年]] *[[2239年]] *[[2299年]] *[[2359年]] *[[2419年]] *[[2479年]] *[[2539年]] *[[2599年]] *[[2659年]] *[[2719年]] *[[2779年]] *[[2839年]] *[[2899年]] *[[2959年]] |}
==己卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[2月]]が己卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==己卯の日== 己卯の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 己卯の日は[[犯土|小土]]の2日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Earth Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:己卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:己卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Earth Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:己卯]]

==己卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って19が余る年が己卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[19年]] *[[79年]] *[[139年]] *[[199年]] *[[259年]] *[[319年]] *[[379年]] *[[439年]] *[[499年]] *[[559年]] *[[619年]] *[[679年]] *[[739年]] *[[799年]] *[[859年]] *[[919年]] *[[979年]] | *[[1039年]] *[[1099年]] *[[1159年]] *[[1219年]] *[[1279年]] *[[1339年]] *[[1399年]] *[[1459年]] *[[1519年]] *[[1579年]] *[[1639年]] *[[1699年]] *[[1759年]] *[[1819年]] *[[1879年]] *[[1939年]] *[[1999年]] | *[[2059年]] *[[2119年]] *[[2179年]] *[[2239年]] *[[2299年]] *[[2359年]] *[[2419年]] *[[2479年]] *[[2539年]] *[[2599年]] *[[2659年]] *[[2719年]] *[[2779年]] *[[2839年]] *[[2899年]] *[[2959年]] |}
==己卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[2月]]が己卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==己卯の日== 己卯の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 己卯の日は[[犯土|小土]]の2日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Earth Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:己卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:己卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Earth Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Earth Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[ja:己卯]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Earth Rabbit]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[sn:Yin Earth Rabbit]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Rabbit]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:Yin Earth Rabbit]][[Category:11]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yin Earth Rabbit]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Earth Rabbit]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rabbit|kanji=己卯|romaji=tsuchinoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=jǐmǎo|w=chi-mao|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 maau5|j=gei2 maau5|ci=kei maːu̯|mc=kɨj maw|oc-bs=kɯʔ maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 己卯'''（つちのとう、きどのうさぎ、きどのう、きぼう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの16番目で、前は[[戊寅]]、次は[[庚辰]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[己]]は陰の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[卯]]は陰の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==己卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って19が余る年が己卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[19年]] *[[79年]] *[[139年]] *[[199年]] *[[259年]] *[[319年]] *[[379年]] *[[439年]] *[[499年]] *[[559年]] *[[619年]] *[[679年]] *[[739年]] *[[799年]] *[[859年]] *[[919年]] *[[979年]] | *[[1039年]] *[[1099年]] *[[1159年]] *[[1219年]] *[[1279年]] *[[1339年]] *[[1399年]] *[[1459年]] *[[1519年]] *[[1579年]] *[[1639年]] *[[1699年]] *[[1759年]] *[[1819年]] *[[1879年]] *[[1939年]] *[[1999年]] | *[[2059年]] *[[2119年]] *[[2179年]] *[[2239年]] *[[2299年]] *[[2359年]] *[[2419年]] *[[2479年]] *[[2539年]] *[[2599年]] *[[2659年]] *[[2719年]] *[[2779年]] *[[2839年]] *[[2899年]] *[[2959年]] |}
==己卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[2月]]が己卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==己卯の日== 己卯の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 己卯の日は[[犯土|小土]]の2日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rabbit|kanji=己卯|romaji=tsuchinoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=jǐmǎo|w=chi-mao|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 maau5|j=gei2 maau5|ci=kei maːu̯|mc=kɨj maw|oc-bs=kɯʔ maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 己卯'''（つちのとう、きどのうさぎ、きどのう、きぼう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの16番目で、前は[[戊寅]]、次は[[庚辰]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[己]]は陰の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[卯]]は陰の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（木剋土）である。
==己卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って19が余る年が己卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[19年]] *[[79年]] *[[139年]] *[[199年]] *[[259年]] *[[319年]] *[[379年]] *[[439年]] *[[499年]] *[[559年]] *[[619年]] *[[679年]] *[[739年]] *[[799年]] *[[859年]] *[[919年]] *[[979年]] | *[[1039年]] *[[1099年]] *[[1159年]] *[[1219年]] *[[1279年]] *[[1339年]] *[[1399年]] *[[1459年]] *[[1519年]] *[[1579年]] *[[1639年]] *[[1699年]] *[[1759年]] *[[1819年]] *[[1879年]] *[[1939年]] *[[1999年]] | *[[2059年]] *[[2119年]] *[[2179年]] *[[2239年]] *[[2299年]] *[[2359年]] *[[2419年]] *[[2479年]] *[[2539年]] *[[2599年]] *[[2659年]] *[[2719年]] *[[2779年]] *[[2839年]] *[[2899年]] *[[2959年]] |}
==己卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[2月]]が己卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062557]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rabbit|kanji=己卯|romaji=tsuchinoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=jǐmǎo|w=chi-mao|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 maau5|j=gei2 maau5|ci=kei maːu̯|mc=kɨj maw|oc-bs=kɯʔ maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうさぎ (tsuchinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gimyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rabbit== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 19 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062557]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rabbit|kanji=己卯|romaji=tsuchinoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=jǐmǎo|w=chi-mao|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 maau5|j=gei2 maau5|ci=kei maːu̯|mc=kɨj maw|oc-bs=kɯʔ maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão

(乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062557]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rabbit|kanji=己卯|romaji=tsuchinoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=jǐmǎo|w=chi-mao|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 maau5|j=gei2 maau5|ci=kei maːu̯|mc=kɨj maw|oc-bs=kɯʔ maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão

[[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão

AD|ja|2959年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2959|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2959 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-māu]][[de:Erde-Hase]][[fr:Lièvre de terre]][[hak:Kí-mâu]][[ja:己卯]][[ko:기묘]][[nds:Eer-Haas]][[vi:Kỷ Mão]][[za:Geijmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-báu]][[zh-yue:己卯]][[zh:己卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062557]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rabbit|kanji=己卯|romaji=tsuchinoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=jǐmǎo|w=chi-mao|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 maau5|j=gei2 maau5|ci=kei maːu̯|mc=kɨj maw|oc-bs=kɯʔ maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-māu]][[de:Erde-Hase]][[fr:Lièvre de terre]][[hak:Kí-mâu]][[ja:己卯]][[ko:기묘]][[nds:Eer-Haas]][[vi:Kỷ Mão]][[za:Geijmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-báu]][[zh-yue:己卯]][[zh:己卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062557]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rabbit|kanji=己卯|romaji=tsuchinoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=jǐmǎo|w=chi-mao|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 maau5|j=gei2 maau5|ci=kei maːu̯|mc=kɨj maw|oc-bs=kɯʔ maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão

Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão

year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

[[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

[[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-māu]][[de:Erde-Hase]][[fr:Lièvre de terre]][[hak:Kí-mâu]][[ja:己卯]][[ko:기묘]][[nds:Eer-Haas]][[vi:Kỷ Mão]][[za:Geijmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-báu]][[zh-yue:己卯]][[zh:己卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062557]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rabbit|kanji=己卯|romaji=tsuchinoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=jǐmǎo|w=chi-mao|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 maau5|j=gei2 maau5|ci=kei maːu̯|mc=kɨj maw|oc-bs=kɯʔ maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão

Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうさぎ (tsuchinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gimyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rabbit== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 19 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯)'s years table''' |- ! AD|ja|2959年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2959|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2959 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly AD|ja|2959年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2959|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2959 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
