It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうさぎ (tsuchinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gimyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rabbit== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 19 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯)'s years table''' |- ! AD|ja|2959年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2959|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2959 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとうさぎ (tsuchinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gimyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rabbit== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 19 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯)'s years table''' |- ! AD|ja|2959年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2959|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2959 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

[[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: kimi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão

AD|ja|2959年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2959|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2959 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly AD|ja|2959年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2959|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2959 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rabbit|kanji=己卯|romaji=tsuchinoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=jǐmǎo|w=chi-mao|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 maau5|j=gei2 maau5|ci=kei maːu̯|mc=kɨj maw|oc-bs=kɯʔ maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: kimi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão

==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Awakening of Insects}} until the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rabbit|kanji=己卯|romaji=tsuchinoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=jǐmǎo|w=chi-mao|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 maau5|j=gei2 maau5|ci=kei maːu̯|mc=kɨj maw|oc-bs=kɯʔ maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão

==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Awakening of Insects}} until the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this ==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Awakening of Insects}} until the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rabbit|kanji=己卯|romaji=tsuchinoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=jǐmǎo|w=chi-mao|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 maau5|j=gei2 maau5|ci=kei maːu̯|mc=kɨj maw|oc-bs=kɯʔ maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).

==Pronunciation==

** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5
**  Japanese:

***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: kimi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão

==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Awakening of Insects}} until the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rabbit|kanji=己卯|romaji=tsuchinoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=jǐmǎo|w=chi-mao|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 maau5|j=gei2 maau5|ci=kei maːu̯|mc=kɨj maw|oc-bs=kɯʔ maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5
**  Japanese:

***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: kimi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão

==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Awakening of Insects}} until the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this ==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Awakening of Insects}} until the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|ltq=Qingming}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this ==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Awakening of Insects}} until the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rabbit|kanji=己卯|romaji=tsuchinoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=jǐmǎo|w=chi-mao|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 maau5|j=gei2 maau5|ci=kei maːu̯|mc=kɨj maw|oc-bs=kɯʔ maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо ==Pronunciation==

** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5
**  Japanese:

***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: kimi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão

==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February|1=February}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Awakening of Insects|1=Jingzhe}} until the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
